entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop affected by charcoal rot and promoted by Streptomyces spp.

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop showing growth promotion by Streptomyces spp.

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A cereal crop showing growth promotion by Streptomyces spp.

entities.name: STREPTOMYCES ALBUS
entities.description: A bacterial strain with plant growth-promotion and antagonistic activity.

entities.name: STREPTOMYCES GRISEUS
entities.description: A bacterial strain with plant growth-promotion and antagonistic activity.

entities.name: STREPTOMYCES CAVOURENSIS
entities.description: A bacterial strain with plant growth-promotion and antagonistic activity.

entities.name: STREPTOMYCES SPP
entities.description: A group of bacteria used for biological control of charcoal rot.

entities.name: MACROPHOMINA PHASEOLINA
entities.description: A fungal pathogen that causes charcoal rot in sorghum.

entities.name: CHARCOAL ROT
entities.description: A disease caused by Macrophomina phaseolina in sorghum.

entities.name: DUAL CULTURE ASSAY
entities.description: A method used to assess the antagonistic potential of bacteria against fungi.

entities.name: METABOLITE PRODUCTION ASSAY
entities.description: A method used to assess the inhibitory effect of bacterial metabolites on fungal growth.

entities.name: BLOTTER PAPER ASSAY
entities.description: A greenhouse-based assay to evaluate the inhibition of a pathogen.

entities.name: GREENHOUSE DISEASE SCREEN
entities.description: An evaluation of disease severity under controlled greenhouse conditions.

entities.name: FIELD DISEASE SCREEN
entities.description: An evaluation of disease severity under natural field conditions.

entities.name: TOOTHPICK METHOD OF INOCULATION
entities.description: A technique used to inoculate plants with pathogens for disease screening.

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COMPONENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to capture phenotypic variations in antioxidant parameters.

entities.name: SCANNING ELECTRON MICROSCOPE ANALYSIS
entities.description: An imaging technique used to examine the integrity of phloem and xylem tissues.

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH-PROMOTION ACTIVITY
entities.description: The ability of certain bacteria to enhance plant growth.

entities.name: ANTAGONISTIC POTENTIAL
entities.description: The ability of a microorganism to inhibit the growth of another microorganism.

entities.name: ANTIOXIDANT PARAMETERS
entities.description: A set of biochemical markers including enzymes and phenolic contents that indicate plant stress response.

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL CONTROL
entities.description: The use of living organisms to suppress pest or pathogen populations.

entities.name: HOST-PLANT RESISTANCE INDUCTION
entities.description: The process of triggering a plant's own defense mechanisms against a pathogen.

entities.name: SUPEROXIDE DISMUTASE
entities.description: An antioxidant enzyme analyzed in sorghum shoots.

entities.name: CATALASE
entities.description: An antioxidant enzyme analyzed in sorghum shoots.

entities.description: An antioxidant enzyme analyzed in sorghum shoots.

entities.name: GUAIACOL PEROXIDASE
entities.description: An antioxidant enzyme analyzed in sorghum shoots.

entities.name: GLUTATHIONE REDUCTASE
entities.description: An antioxidant enzyme analyzed in sorghum shoots.

entities.name: PHENYLALANINE AMMONIA-LYASE
entities.description: An enzyme involved in the phenylpropanoid pathway analyzed in sorghum shoots.

entities.name: POLYPHENOL OXIDASE
entities.description: An enzyme involved in the oxidation of phenols analyzed in sorghum shoots.

entities.name: TOTAL PHENOLIC CONTENTS
entities.description: The sum of phenolic compounds measured in sorghum shoots.
